mapper.sql: id, category_id, title, summary, ai_summary, ai_sentiment, ai_status, content, source, image_url, status, publish_time, create_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO news_article (category_id, title, summary, ai_summary, ai_sentiment, ai_status, content, source, image_url, status, publish_time, create_time) VALUES (#{categoryId}, #{title}, #{summary}, #{aiSummary}, #{aiSentiment}, #{aiStatus}, #{content}, #{source}, #{imageUrl}, #{status}, #{publishTime}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE news_article SET category_id = #{categoryId}, title = #{title}, summary = #{summary}, ai_summary = #{aiSummary}, ai_sentiment = #{aiSentiment}, ai_status = #{aiStatus}, content = #{content}, source = #{source}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, status = #{status}, publish_time = #{publishTime}, create_time = #{createTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM news_article WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY publish_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM news_article WHERE status = 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM news_article WHERE status = 1 AND category_id = #{categoryId}
